features: THERAPEUTIC BATH: Elysium Spa Epsom Salts, whether soaking your feet or taking a bath in espsom salts, you will soothe muscle aches, relax the body, improve circulation and even treat sunburn. Fragranced with eucalyptus essential oil

100 PercentNATURAL: Elysium Spa Epsom Salt is magnesium sulphate, a pure mineral compound with a variety of uses. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins
SOOTHE & RELAX: Perfect for those with an extremely active lifestyle. Helping you soothe all those aches and pains that come with it.
RESTFUL SLEEP: Adding epsom salts to a bath will help the relaxation of the body and mind to promote a restful night's sleep
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use, resealable bag 450g
description: Product Description Elysium Spa Epsom Salts, whether soaking your feet or taking a bath in espsom salts, you will soothe muscle aches, relax the body, improve circulation and even treat sunburn. Elysium Spa Epsom Salt is magnesium sulphate, a pure mineral compound with a variety of uses. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins. Perfect for those with an extremely active lifestyle, helping you soothe all those aches and pains that come with it. Adding epsom salts to a bath will help the relaxation of the body and mind to promote a restful night's sleep. Ready to use, fragranced with eucalyptus oil and resealable bag 450g Ingredients Magnesium Sulfate, Parfum, Hexyl Cinnamal. Directions Add a generous amount (approximately 2 handfuls) to warm, running bath water for a wonderfully soothing & relaxing bath. Soak for at least 20 minutes to give the Epsom Salts a chance to soften the skin and to be absorbed. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. Do not use of broken skin. Keep in a cool dry place as over time salt can attract moisture. Avoid contact with eyes. If irritation occurs discontinue use. See more
